name: Farseer Staff
description: The multiple attempts to marry Hieronite teachings with elven rituals produced a number of prominent Aldorian saints capable of glimpsing into the future - nevertheless, most of the clergy rejected this path, branding it as a perversion of the church traditions.
descriptionZh: 奥尔多的圣会多次尝试将圣门教义与精灵仪礼结合，造就了若干声名显赫的先知圣徒。可是大多数祭司将这种方式斥为颠覆教会传统，不愿采用。
